  • Method Details

    • makeAssociativePredicate

      public static Predicate makeAssociativePredicate(FormulaFactory ff, int tag, Predicate left, Predicate right, SourceLocation loc)
      Flattens the children of an associative predicate.
      Parameters:
      ff - the Formula Factory
      tag - either Formula.LAND or Formula.LOR
      left - child one
      right - child two
      loc - the source location
      Returns:
      the new flattened predicate.

    • makeAssociativePredicate

      public static Predicate makeAssociativePredicate(FormulaFactory ff, int tag, List<Predicate> preds, SourceLocation loc)
      Flattens the children of an associative predicate.
      Parameters:
      ff - the Formula Factory
      tag - either Formula.LAND or Formula.LOR
      preds - the children
      loc - the source location
      Returns:
      the new flattened predicate.

      Parameters:

      left - child one
      right - child two
      loc - the source location
      Returns:
      the new flattened predicate.

      public static Predicate makeLorPredicate(FormulaFactory ff, List<Predicate> preds, SourceLocation loc)

      preds - the children
      loc - the source location

      the new flattened predicate.

    • makeSimplifiedAssociativePredicate

      public static Predicate makeSimplifiedAssociativePredicate(FormulaFactory ff, int tag, List<Predicate> children, Predicate neutral, Predicate determinant, SourceLocation loc, Predicate oldPredicate)
      Simplifies an associative predicate.
      Parameters:
      ff - the Formula Factory used
      tag - either Formula.LAND or Formula.LOR
      children -
      neutral - if an occurrence of this predicate is found, it is ignored.
      determinant - If an occurrence of this predicate is found, this parameter is the result.
      loc - the source location
      oldPredicate - is the result if not null and if no occurrencce of determinant or netral is found.
      Returns:
      a new Predicate
